name: Lemon Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients and mix well.
2. Press mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Pour filling onto the slightly cooled crust.
5. Mix together flour, sugar, beaten eggs, lemon juice, and rind.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until the filling is set.
7. Cool and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
